parameters.query:
with overdue_checkouts as (
  select tcl.site_id, s.owner_id, s.site_name, ti.tool_name, tcl.checked_out_to, tcl.checked_out_at
  from tool_checkout_log tcl
  join tool_inventory ti on ti.id = tcl.tool_id
  join sites s on s.id = tcl.site_id and s.status = 'active'
  where tcl.returned_at is null
    and tcl.checked_out_at < now() - interval '7 days'
),
latest_maintenance as (
  select distinct on (tool_id) tool_id, next_due_date
  from equipment_maintenance_log
  where next_due_date is not null
  order by tool_id, performed_at desc
),
maintenance_due as (
  select ti.site_id, s.owner_id, s.site_name, ti.tool_name, lm.next_due_date
  from latest_maintenance lm
  join tool_inventory ti on ti.id = lm.tool_id
  join sites s on s.id = ti.site_id and s.status = 'active'
  where lm.next_due_date <= current_date + interval '7 days'
),
combined as (
  select owner_id, site_name,
    ('Overdue checkout: ' || tool_name || ' (out to ' || checked_out_to || ' since ' || to_char(checked_out_at, 'DD Mon') || ')') as line
  from overdue_checkouts
  union all
  select owner_id, site_name,
    ('Maintenance due: ' || tool_name || ' (' || (case when next_due_date < current_date then 'OVERDUE ' else 'due ' end) || to_char(next_due_date, 'DD Mon YYYY') || ')') as line
  from maintenance_due
)
select
  c.owner_id,
  p.phone_number as owner_phone,
  count(*) as item_count,
  string_agg('- ' || c.site_name || ': ' || c.line, E'\n' order by c.site_name) as digest_body
from combined c
join profiles p on p.id = c.owner_id
group by c.owner_id, p.phone_number;

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "number": $json.owner_phone.replace(/\D/g, ''), "text": "🛠️ *Tool & Maintenance Digest*

" + $json.item_count + " item(s) needing attention:

" + $json.digest_body + "

Open Mutiso.AI to review." } }}
